_comment: Recorded Azure Emissions Impact Dashboard emissions (M14.16). Scope-2 estimates in tonnes CO2e (tCO2e). Rows are keyed by days_ago (not an absolute date) so they always land inside the query window, mirroring the mock cost collector. Two resource-grain rows attribute to inventory (vm-web-01, disk-orphan-01 — the orphaned disk also drives the wasted-emissions tie-in); the Azure Monitor row is kept at SERVICE grain because the dashboard reports it without a resource id — never fabricated to per-resource. Placeholder subscription 00000000-... is retargeted to the onboarded subscription on ingest. Estimates only.
